name: Money Line
description_short: Money One Federal Credit Union is a Maryland-based, member-owned credit union serving the Largo and Upper Marlboro areas with auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, and checking accounts.
description_long:
Money One Federal Credit Union (Money One FCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Maryland, serving communities in the Largo and Upper Marlboro areas. According to their website, they are described as "the healthiest credit union in Maryland" by DepositAccounts.com, indicating strong financial stability and management.

Money One offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (with an integrated vehicle search tool), home mortgages, home equity loans, personal loans, credit cards, checking accounts (including a "Teen Dream Checking" product), and online banking with mobile app access (CardWiz app). They provide home buying assistance through HomeAdvantage integration and allow members to compare home and auto quotes online. The credit union emphasizes accessibility through online banking, bill payment services, and fraud alert resources.

What distinguishes Money One is their flexible membership eligibility structure: members can join through nearly 100 approved employers and organizations, family relationships to existing members, charitable partnerships (Easter Seals), or by residing in 35+ qualifying zip codes across Maryland. This broadened eligibility approach makes membership accessible beyond traditional occupational or geographic constraints. The organization also demonstrates consumer education commitment through blog posts on credit reports and tax preparation.

As a credit union, Money One operates on a not-for-profit basis, meaning earnings benefit members rather than external shareholders. However, membership is restricted to specific eligibility criteria—not all consumers can join regardless of location or employment. Like all credit unions, they are regulated by the NCUA and offer share accounts and share certificates rather than traditional deposit accounts, though the website uses standard banking terminology. Service hours are limited (Monday-Friday, 8:30am-4:30pm), which may inconvenience those needing weekend or extended hours support.
address: 521 E San Ysidro Blvd, San Diego, CA 92173

company_info.headquarters: 521 E San Ysidro Blvd, San Diego, CA 92173

pros: Rated "the healthiest credit union in Maryland" by DepositAccounts.com, indicating strong financial stability
Flexible membership eligibility through 100+ approved employers/organizations, family relationships, charitable partnerships, and 35+ qualifying zip codes
Comprehensive product suite including auto loans with integrated vehicle search tool, mortgages, home equity loans, personal loans, and credit cards
Free home buying tools through HomeAdvantage integration with no closing cost
New CardWiz mobile app for convenient banking on-the-go
Not-for-profit structure means earnings benefit members rather than external shareholders
Fraud alert resources and security features to protect members against recent scams
cons: Membership restricted by eligibility criteria—not universally available to all consumers regardless of location or employment
Limited service hours (Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm only) with no weekend support mentioned
Specific interest rates, fees, and loan terms not disclosed on website, requiring direct inquiry
Geographic service footprint limited primarily to Maryland zip codes in Largo/Upper Marlboro area
No mention of branch locations beyond Largo and Upper Marlboro, limiting in-person access for distant members
best_for: Maryland residents in qualifying zip codes seeking membership-based, not-for-profit lending alternatives
Employees of the 100+ approved employers and organizations eligible for membership
Families with existing Money One members seeking to expand household membership
First-time homebuyers and auto purchasers wanting integrated shopping and lending tools
diagnosis: Money One FCU is best for Maryland residents who meet one of their four membership eligibility criteria and seek not-for-profit, member-owned lending with competitive products. The primary caveat is that membership is restricted to qualifying individuals—you must live in specific zip codes, work for an approved employer, have family connections to current members, or join through a partnership organization to access their services.
services: Auto loans with integrated vehicle search and comparison tool (new and pre-owned vehicles)
Home mortgages and home equity loans for home purchase and refinance
Personal loans for life events and expenses
Teen Dream Checking account for younger members
Standard checking and savings accounts (share accounts)
Online banking platform with bill payment functionality
Home buying assistance through HomeAdvantage integration
Home and auto quote comparison tools
